data.author: Lucifer of Cagliari
data.quote: It was he who was and is and always shall be in the form of the Father, the true Son, immutable and unchangeable because he is God and the all-powerful Son of the Almighty, who nonetheless deigned to lower himself for our salvation, so that he might cause us to rise even as we lay prostrate.
data.source_title: ON DYING FOR THE SON OF GOD 12
